title: Dev Environment
subtitle: local IDE wiring
description: Local developer-environment helpers for generated IDE wiring. It owns VS Code task/launch generation from explicit template and game registries, but not game or template creation.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Dev Environment module contract: local IDE wiring owner, generated outputs, boundaries, and commands.

children.title: vscode_projects.mjs
children.description: Generates .vscode/tasks.json and .vscode/launch.json from registered templates and games so VS Code can build packs, build games, and launch each playable project explicitly.

children.title: vscode_projects.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies VS Code project entry generator contracts.
children.role: VS Code project entry generator tests

children.title: .vscode/tasks.json
children.description: Generated VS Code task list for registered templates and games. Regenerate with ai_studio/dev_environment/vscode_projects.mjs.

children.title: .vscode/launch.json
children.description: Generated VS Code launch configurations for registered templates and games. Regenerate with ai_studio/dev_environment/vscode_projects.mjs.
